# mozjpeg-rs public API — doc(hidden) items and excluded-feature surface
# excluded features: _instrument-c-mozjpeg-internals
# (regenerated on every `cargo test` by zenutils-apidoc; ZEN_API_DOC=check verifies, =off skips).
# Encodings: crate-name prefix stripped; auto traits collapse to a
# count + exceptions; trait impls collapse to one roster line per
# type (method signatures live at the trait definition); blanket
# impls omitted; re-export duplicates annotated `[also: path]`.
# DO NOT EDIT BY HAND — commit regenerated changes with the code.

## summary
#
#   pub modules                                21
#   pub types (struct/enum/trait/alias)        20
#   pub consts/statics                         41
#   free functions                             79
#   inherent methods                          131
#   struct fields                              22
#   enum variants                              20
#   trait roster entries (type × trait)        41

pub ConfigError::UnsupportedQuantTable(consts::QuantTableIdx)
pub QuantTableIdx::Ahumada = 7
pub QuantTableIdx::Flat = 1
pub QuantTableIdx::JpegAnnexK = 0
pub QuantTableIdx::Klein = 5
pub QuantTableIdx::MssimTuned = 2
pub QuantTableIdx::Peterson = 8
pub QuantTableIdx::PsnrHvsM = 4
pub QuantTableIdx::Robidoux = 3
pub QuantTableIdx::Watson = 6

## auto traits

12 types implement all of: Freeze, RefUnwindSafe, Send, Sync, Unpin, UnwindSafe
bitstream::BitWriter<W>: !Freeze !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !Unpin !UnwindSafe
entropy::EntropyEncoder<'a, W>: !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !UnwindSafe
entropy::ProgressiveEncoder<'a, W>: !RefUnwindSafe !Send !Sync !UnwindSafe
